revision.text:
{{#invoke:navbox|navbox |name = Latin script/main |state = {{{state|<noinclude>uncollapsed</noinclude>}}}
| title = [[Latin script]] | bodyclass = hlist
|above= * [[History of the Latin script|History]] * [[Spread of the Latin script|Spread]] * [[Romanization]] * [[Roman numerals]] * [[Ligature_(writing)#Latin_alphabet|Ligatures]]
|group1=[[Latin-script alphabet|Alphabets]] ([[List of Latin-script alphabets|list]]) |list1= *[[Classical Latin alphabet]] *[[ISO basic Latin alphabet]] *Phonetic alphabets **[[International Phonetic Alphabet]] **[[X-SAMPA]] *[[Spelling alphabet]]
|group2=Letters ([[List of Latin-script letters|list]]) |list2 = {{(!}} style="margin: 0 -0.25em; width: 100%;" {{!}}- {{Latin script/row26col | title=Letters of the [[ISO basic Latin alphabet]]}} {{Latin script/row26col |A{{!}}Aa|B{{!}}Bb|C{{!}}Cc|D{{!}}Dd|E{{!}}Ee|F{{!}}Ff|G{{!}}Gg|H{{!}}Hh|I{{!}}Ii|J{{!}}Jj|K{{!}}Kk|L{{!}}Ll|M{{!}}Mm |N{{!}}Nn|O{{!}}Oo|P{{!}}Pp|Q{{!}}Qq|R{{!}}Rr|S{{!}}Ss|T{{!}}Tt|U{{!}}Uu|V{{!}}Vv|W{{!}}Ww|X{{!}}Xx|Y{{!}}Yy|Z{{!}}Zz }} {{Latin script/row26col | title=Additional Latin letters}} {{Latin script/row26col |Æ{{!}}Æ æ|Latin alpha{{!}}Ɑ ɑ|Turned v{{!}}Ʌ ʌ|Latin beta{{!}}Ꞵ ꞵ|eth{{!}}Ð ð|Latin epsilon{{!}}Ɛ ɛ|Ə{{!}}Ə ə|Ǝ{{!}}Ǝ ə|Latin gamma{{!}}Ɣ ɣ|Gha{{!}}Ƣ ƣ|Latin iota{{!}}Ɩ ɩ|Turned h{{!}}Ɥ ɥ|Lambda (Latin letter){{!}}Ꟛ ꟛ|Eng (letter){{!}}Ŋ ŋ |Œ{{!}}Œ œ|Open O{{!}}Ɔ ɔ|ɤ{{!}}Ɤ ɤ|Kra (letter){{!}}Kʼ ĸ|Ʀ{{!}}Ʀ ʀ|ß{{!}}ẞ ß|Esh (letter){{!}}Ʃ ʃ|Ɯ{{!}}Ɯ ɯ|Ʊ{{!}}Ʊ ʊ|Latin omega{{!}}Ꞷ ꞷ|Ʋ{{!}}Ʋ ʋ|Wynn{{!}}Ƿ ƿ }} {{Latin script/row26col |Yogh{{!}}Ȝ ȝ|Latin theta{{!}}ϴ θ|Ezh{{!}}Ʒ ʒ|Ƹ{{!}}Ƹ ƹ|Thorn (letter){{!}}Þ þ|Ou (ligature){{!}}Ȣ ȣ|Chi (letter){{!}}Ꭓ ꭓ|Glottal stop (letter){{!}}Ɂ ʔ ɂ|꟎{{!}}꟎ ʕ ꟏|ǀ|ǁ|ǂ|ǃ|ʘ|ʻOkina{{!}}ʻ|Modifier letter apostrophe{{!}}ʼ|Saltillo (linguistics){{!}}Ꞌ ꞌ|3 (letter){{!}}3|Tresillo (letter){{!}}Ꜫ ꜫ|Cuatrillo{{!}}Ꜭ ꜭ|7 (letter){{!}}7|}} {{!}}- {{Latin script/letter with all diacritics| show letter={{{show letter|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic|no}}} }} {{!}}- <!-- if needed or requested: show second block of diacritics --> {{#switch: {{{show diacritic|no}}} |dot = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic=dot below}} |#default = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic 2|no}}} }} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/AZ09 pairs| 1={{{1|}}} | show pairs={{{show pairs|no}}}| show letter={{{show letter|}}}}} {{!)}}
|group3=[[Latin-script multigraph|Multigraphs]] |list3={{#invoke:navbox|navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = | liststyle = | listclass = hlist |group1 = [[List of Latin-script digraphs|Digraphs]] |list1 = *[[Ch (digraph)|Ch]] *[[Dz (digraph)|Dz]] *[[Dž]] *[[Gh (digraph)|Gh]] *[[IJ (digraph)|IJ]] *[[Lj (digraph)|Lj]] *[[Ll]] *[[Hungarian ly|Ly]] *[[Nh (digraph)|Nh]] *[[Nj (digraph)|Nj]] *[[Ny (digraph)|Ny]] *[[Sh (digraph)|Sh]] *[[Sz (digraph)|Sz]] *[[Th (digraph)|Th]] |group2 = [[List of Latin-script trigraphs|Trigraphs]] |list2 = * [[Hungarian dzs|dzs]] * [[Eau (trigraph)|eau]] |group3 = [[List of Latin-script tetragraphs|Tetragraphs]] |list3 = *[[Ough (orthography)|ough]] <!--|group4 = [[List of Latin-script pentagraphs|Pentagraphs]] |list4 = [[tzsch]]-->
}} |group4=Keyboard layouts ([[List of Latin-script keyboard layouts|list]]) |list4= * [[QWERTY]] * [[QWERTZ]] * [[AZERTY]] * [[Dvorak keyboard layout|Dvorak]] * [[Colemak]] * [[BÉPO]] * [[Neo (keyboard layout)|Neo]]
|group5=Historical standards |list5= * [[ISO/IEC 646]] * [[Western Latin character sets]]
|group6=Current standards |list6= * [[Latin script in Unicode|Unicode]] * [[DIN 91379|DIN 91379: Unicode subset for Europe]]
|group7=Lists |list7= * [[List of precomposed Latin characters in Unicode|Precomposed Latin characters in Unicode]] * [[Latin letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering|Letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering]] * [[List of typographical symbols and punctuation marks]]
|below = * [[Diacritic]]s * [[Palaeography]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|Template:Latin script/doc}} </noinclude>

{{#invoke:navbox|navbox |name = Latin script/main |state = {{{state|<noinclude>uncollapsed</noinclude>}}}
| title = [[Latin script]] | bodyclass = hlist
|above= * [[History of the Latin script|History]] * [[Spread of the Latin script|Spread]] * [[Romanization]] * [[Roman numerals]] * [[Ligature_(writing)#Latin_alphabet|Ligatures]]
|group1=[[Latin-script alphabet|Alphabets]] ([[List of Latin-script alphabets|list]]) |list1= *[[Classical Latin alphabet]] *[[ISO basic Latin alphabet]] *Phonetic alphabets **[[International Phonetic Alphabet]] **[[X-SAMPA]] *[[Spelling alphabet]]
|group2=Letters ([[List of Latin-script letters|list]]) |list2 = {{(!}} style="margin: 0 -0.25em; width: 100%;" {{!}}- {{Latin script/row26col | title=Letters of the [[ISO basic Latin alphabet]]}} {{Latin script/row26col |A{{!}}Aa|B{{!}}Bb|C{{!}}Cc|D{{!}}Dd|E{{!}}Ee|F{{!}}Ff|G{{!}}Gg|H{{!}}Hh|I{{!}}Ii|J{{!}}Jj|K{{!}}Kk|L{{!}}Ll|M{{!}}Mm |N{{!}}Nn|O{{!}}Oo|P{{!}}Pp|Q{{!}}Qq|R{{!}}Rr|S{{!}}Ss|T{{!}}Tt|U{{!}}Uu|V{{!}}Vv|W{{!}}Ww|X{{!}}Xx|Y{{!}}Yy|Z{{!}}Zz }} {{Latin script/row26col | title=Additional Latin letters}} {{Latin script/row26col |Æ{{!}}Æ æ|Latin alpha{{!}}Ɑ ɑ|Turned v{{!}}Ʌ ʌ|Latin beta{{!}}Ꞵ ꞵ|eth{{!}}Ð ð|Latin epsilon{{!}}Ɛ ɛ|Ə{{!}}Ə ə|Ǝ{{!}}Ǝ ə|Latin gamma{{!}}Ɣ ɣ|Gha{{!}}Ƣ ƣ|Latin iota{{!}}Ɩ ɩ|Turned h{{!}}Ɥ ɥ|Lambda (Latin letter){{!}}Ꟛ ꟛ|Eng (letter){{!}}Ŋ ŋ |Œ{{!}}Œ œ|Open O{{!}}Ɔ ɔ|ɤ{{!}}Ɤ ɤ|Kra (letter){{!}}Kʼ ĸ|Ʀ{{!}}Ʀ ʀ|ß{{!}}ẞ ß|Esh (letter){{!}}Ʃ ʃ|Ɯ{{!}}Ɯ ɯ|Ʊ{{!}}Ʊ ʊ|Latin omega{{!}}Ꞷ ꞷ|Ʋ{{!}}Ʋ ʋ|Wynn{{!}}Ƿ ƿ }} {{Latin script/row26col |Yogh{{!}}Ȝ ȝ|Latin theta{{!}}ϴ θ|Ezh{{!}}Ʒ ʒ|Ƹ{{!}}Ƹ ƹ|Thorn (letter){{!}}Þ þ|Ou (ligature){{!}}Ȣ ȣ|Chi (letter){{!}}Ꭓ ꭓ|Glottal stop (letter){{!}}Ɂ ʔ ɂ|꟎{{!}}꟎ ʕ ꟏|ǀ|ǁ|ǂ|ǃ|ʘ|ʻOkina{{!}}ʻ|Modifier letter apostrophe{{!}}ʼ|Saltillo (linguistics){{!}}Ꞌ ꞌ|3 (letter){{!}}3|Tresillo (letter){{!}}Ꜫ ꜫ|Cuatrillo{{!}}Ꜭ ꜭ|7 (letter){{!}}7|}} {{!}}- {{Latin script/letter with all diacritics| show letter={{{show letter|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic|no}}} }} {{!}}- <!-- if needed or requested: show second block of diacritics --> {{#switch: {{{show diacritic|no}}} |dot = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic=dot below}} |#default = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic 2|no}}} }} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/AZ09 pairs| 1={{{1|}}} | show pairs={{{show pairs|no}}}| show letter={{{show letter|}}}}} {{!)}}
|group3=[[Latin-script multigraph|Multigraphs]] |list3={{#invoke:navbox|navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = | liststyle = | listclass = hlist |group1 = [[List of Latin-script digraphs|Digraphs]] |list1 = *[[Ch (digraph)|Ch]] *[[Dz (digraph)|Dz]] *[[Dž]] *[[Gh (digraph)|Gh]] *[[IJ (digraph)|IJ]] *[[Lj (digraph)|Lj]] *[[Ll]] *[[Hungarian ly|Ly]] *[[Nh (digraph)|Nh]] *[[Nj (digraph)|Nj]] *[[Ny (digraph)|Ny]] *[[Sh (digraph)|Sh]] *[[Sz (digraph)|Sz]] *[[Th (digraph)|Th]] |group2 = [[List of Latin-script trigraphs|Trigraphs]] |list2 = * [[Hungarian dzs|dzs]] * [[Eau (trigraph)|eau]] |group3 = [[List of Latin-script tetragraphs|Tetragraphs]] |list3 = *[[Ough (orthography)|ough]] <!--|group4 = [[List of Latin-script pentagraphs|Pentagraphs]] |list4 = [[tzsch]]-->
}} |group4=Keyboard layouts ([[List of Latin-script keyboard layouts|list]]) |list4= * [[QWERTY]] * [[QWERTZ]] * [[AZERTY]] * [[Dvorak keyboard layout|Dvorak]] * [[Colemak]] * [[BÉPO]] * [[Neo (keyboard layout)|Neo]]
|group5=Historical standards |list5= * [[ISO/IEC 646]] * [[Western Latin character sets]]
|group6=Current standards |list6= * [[Latin script in Unicode|Unicode]] * [[DIN 91379|DIN 91379: Unicode subset for Europe]]
|group7=Lists |list7= * [[List of precomposed Latin characters in Unicode|Precomposed Latin characters in Unicode]] * [[Latin letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering|Letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering]] * [[List of typographical symbols and punctuation marks]]
|below = * [[Diacritic]]s * [[Palaeography]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|Template:Latin script/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: add tones two, five, six; remove [[3 (letter)]] as it just links to a language page
revision.text:
{{#invoke:navbox|navbox |name = Latin script/main |state = {{{state|<noinclude>uncollapsed</noinclude>}}}
| title = [[Latin script]] | bodyclass = hlist
|above= * [[History of the Latin script|History]] * [[Spread of the Latin script|Spread]] * [[Romanization]] * [[Roman numerals]] * [[Ligature_(writing)#Latin_alphabet|Ligatures]]
|group1=[[Latin-script alphabet|Alphabets]] ([[List of Latin-script alphabets|list]]) |list1= *[[Classical Latin alphabet]] *[[ISO basic Latin alphabet]] *Phonetic alphabets **[[International Phonetic Alphabet]] **[[X-SAMPA]] *[[Spelling alphabet]]
|group2=Letters ([[List of Latin-script letters|list]]) |list2 = {{(!}} style="margin: 0 -0.25em; width: 100%;" {{!}}- {{Latin script/row26col | title=Letters of the [[ISO basic Latin alphabet]]}} {{Latin script/row26col |A{{!}}Aa|B{{!}}Bb|C{{!}}Cc|D{{!}}Dd|E{{!}}Ee|F{{!}}Ff|G{{!}}Gg|H{{!}}Hh|I{{!}}Ii|J{{!}}Jj|K{{!}}Kk|L{{!}}Ll|M{{!}}Mm |N{{!}}Nn|O{{!}}Oo|P{{!}}Pp|Q{{!}}Qq|R{{!}}Rr|S{{!}}Ss|T{{!}}Tt|U{{!}}Uu|V{{!}}Vv|W{{!}}Ww|X{{!}}Xx|Y{{!}}Yy|Z{{!}}Zz }} {{Latin script/row26col | title=Additional Latin letters}} {{Latin script/row26col |Æ{{!}}Æ æ|Latin alpha{{!}}Ɑ ɑ|Turned v{{!}}Ʌ ʌ|Latin beta{{!}}Ꞵ ꞵ|eth{{!}}Ð ð|Latin epsilon{{!}}Ɛ ɛ|Ə{{!}}Ə ə|Ǝ{{!}}Ǝ ə|Latin gamma{{!}}Ɣ ɣ|Gha{{!}}Ƣ ƣ|Latin iota{{!}}Ɩ ɩ|Turned h{{!}}Ɥ ɥ|Lambda (Latin letter){{!}}Ꟛ ꟛ|Eng (letter){{!}}Ŋ ŋ |Œ{{!}}Œ œ|Open O{{!}}Ɔ ɔ|ɤ{{!}}Ɤ ɤ|Kra (letter){{!}}Kʼ ĸ|Ʀ{{!}}Ʀ ʀ|ß{{!}}ẞ ß|Esh (letter){{!}}Ʃ ʃ|Ɯ{{!}}Ɯ ɯ|Ʊ{{!}}Ʊ ʊ|Latin omega{{!}}Ꞷ ꞷ|Ʋ{{!}}Ʋ ʋ|Wynn{{!}}Ƿ ƿ }} {{Latin script/row26col |Yogh{{!}}Ȝ ȝ|Latin theta{{!}}ϴ θ|Ezh{{!}}Ʒ ʒ|Ƹ{{!}}Ƹ ƹ|Thorn (letter){{!}}Þ þ|Ou (ligature){{!}}Ȣ ȣ|Chi (letter){{!}}Ꭓ ꭓ|Glottal stop (letter){{!}}Ɂ ʔ ɂ|꟎{{!}}꟎ ʕ ꟏|ǀ|ǁ|ǂ|ǃ|ʘ|ʻOkina{{!}}ʻ|Modifier letter apostrophe{{!}}ʼ|Saltillo (linguistics){{!}}Ꞌ ꞌ|Tone two{{!}}Ƨ ƨ|Tresillo (letter){{!}}Ꜫ ꜫ|Cuatrillo{{!}}Ꜭ ꜭ|Tone five{{!}}Ƽ ƽ|Tone six{{!}}Ƅ ƅ|7 (letter){{!}}7|}} {{!}}- {{Latin script/letter with all diacritics| show letter={{{show letter|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic|no}}} }} {{!}}- <!-- if needed or requested: show second block of diacritics --> {{#switch: {{{show diacritic|no}}} |dot = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic=dot below}} |#default = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic 2|no}}} }} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/AZ09 pairs| 1={{{1|}}} | show pairs={{{show pairs|no}}}| show letter={{{show letter|}}}}} {{!)}}
|group3=[[Latin-script multigraph|Multigraphs]] |list3={{#invoke:navbox|navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = | liststyle = | listclass = hlist |group1 = [[List of Latin-script digraphs|Digraphs]] |list1 = *[[Ch (digraph)|Ch]] *[[Dz (digraph)|Dz]] *[[Dž]] *[[Gh (digraph)|Gh]] *[[IJ (digraph)|IJ]] *[[Lj (digraph)|Lj]] *[[Ll]] *[[Hungarian ly|Ly]] *[[Nh (digraph)|Nh]] *[[Nj (digraph)|Nj]] *[[Ny (digraph)|Ny]] *[[Sh (digraph)|Sh]] *[[Sz (digraph)|Sz]] *[[Th (digraph)|Th]] |group2 = [[List of Latin-script trigraphs|Trigraphs]] |list2 = * [[Hungarian dzs|dzs]] * [[Eau (trigraph)|eau]] |group3 = [[List of Latin-script tetragraphs|Tetragraphs]] |list3 = *[[Ough (orthography)|ough]] <!--|group4 = [[List of Latin-script pentagraphs|Pentagraphs]] |list4 = [[tzsch]]-->
}} |group4=Keyboard layouts ([[List of Latin-script keyboard layouts|list]]) |list4= * [[QWERTY]] * [[QWERTZ]] * [[AZERTY]] * [[Dvorak keyboard layout|Dvorak]] * [[Colemak]] * [[BÉPO]] * [[Neo (keyboard layout)|Neo]]
|group5=Historical standards |list5= * [[ISO/IEC 646]] * [[Western Latin character sets]]
|group6=Current standards |list6= * [[Latin script in Unicode|Unicode]] * [[DIN 91379|DIN 91379: Unicode subset for Europe]]
|group7=Lists |list7= * [[List of precomposed Latin characters in Unicode|Precomposed Latin characters in Unicode]] * [[Latin letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering|Letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering]] * [[List of typographical symbols and punctuation marks]]
|below = * [[Diacritic]]s * [[Palaeography]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|Template:Latin script/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
{{#invoke:navbox|navbox |name = Latin script/main |state = {{{state|<noinclude>uncollapsed</noinclude>}}}
| title = [[Latin script]] | bodyclass = hlist
|above= * [[History of the Latin script|History]] * [[Spread of the Latin script|Spread]] * [[Romanization]] * [[Roman numerals]] * [[Ligature_(writing)#Latin_alphabet|Ligatures]]
|group1=[[Latin-script alphabet|Alphabets]] ([[List of Latin-script alphabets|list]]) |list1= *[[Classical Latin alphabet]] *[[ISO basic Latin alphabet]] *Phonetic alphabets **[[International Phonetic Alphabet]] **[[X-SAMPA]] *[[Spelling alphabet]]
|group2=Letters ([[List of Latin-script letters|list]]) |list2 = {{(!}} style="margin: 0 -0.25em; width: 100%;" {{!}}- {{Latin script/row26col | title=Letters of the [[ISO basic Latin alphabet]]}} {{Latin script/row26col |A{{!}}Aa|B{{!}}Bb|C{{!}}Cc|D{{!}}Dd|E{{!}}Ee|F{{!}}Ff|G{{!}}Gg|H{{!}}Hh|I{{!}}Ii|J{{!}}Jj|K{{!}}Kk|L{{!}}Ll|M{{!}}Mm |N{{!}}Nn|O{{!}}Oo|P{{!}}Pp|Q{{!}}Qq|R{{!}}Rr|S{{!}}Ss|T{{!}}Tt|U{{!}}Uu|V{{!}}Vv|W{{!}}Ww|X{{!}}Xx|Y{{!}}Yy|Z{{!}}Zz }} {{Latin script/row26col | title=Additional Latin letters}} {{Latin script/row26col |Æ{{!}}Æ æ|Latin alpha{{!}}Ɑ ɑ|Turned v{{!}}Ʌ ʌ|Latin beta{{!}}Ꞵ ꞵ|eth{{!}}Ð ð|Latin epsilon{{!}}Ɛ ɛ|Ə{{!}}Ə ə|Ǝ{{!}}Ǝ ə|Latin gamma{{!}}Ɣ ɣ|Gha{{!}}Ƣ ƣ|Latin iota{{!}}Ɩ ɩ|Turned h{{!}}Ɥ ɥ|Lambda (Latin letter){{!}}Ꟛ ꟛ|Eng (letter){{!}}Ŋ ŋ |Œ{{!}}Œ œ|Open O{{!}}Ɔ ɔ|ɤ{{!}}Ɤ ɤ|Kra (letter){{!}}Kʼ ĸ|Ʀ{{!}}Ʀ ʀ|ß{{!}}ẞ ß|Esh (letter){{!}}Ʃ ʃ|Ɯ{{!}}Ɯ ɯ|Ʊ{{!}}Ʊ ʊ|Latin omega{{!}}Ꞷ ꞷ|Ʋ{{!}}Ʋ ʋ|Wynn{{!}}Ƿ ƿ }} {{Latin script/row26col |Yogh{{!}}Ȝ ȝ|Latin theta{{!}}ϴ θ|Ezh{{!}}Ʒ ʒ|Ƹ{{!}}Ƹ ƹ|Thorn (letter){{!}}Þ þ|Ou (ligature){{!}}Ȣ ȣ|Chi (letter){{!}}Ꭓ ꭓ|Glottal stop (letter){{!}}Ɂ ʔ ɂ|꟎{{!}}꟎ ʕ ꟏|ǀ|ǁ|ǂ|ǃ|ʘ|ʻOkina{{!}}ʻ|Modifier letter apostrophe{{!}}ʼ|Saltillo (linguistics){{!}}Ꞌ ꞌ|Tone two{{!}}Ƨ ƨ|Tresillo (letter){{!}}Ꜫ ꜫ|Cuatrillo{{!}}Ꜭ ꜭ|Tone five{{!}}Ƽ ƽ|Tone six{{!}}Ƅ ƅ|7 (letter){{!}}7|}} {{!}}- {{Latin script/letter with all diacritics| show letter={{{show letter|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic|no}}} }} {{!}}- <!-- if needed or requested: show second block of diacritics --> {{#switch: {{{show diacritic|no}}} |dot = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic=dot below}} |#default = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic 2|no}}} }} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/AZ09 pairs| 1={{{1|}}} | show pairs={{{show pairs|no}}}| show letter={{{show letter|}}}}} {{!)}}
|group3=[[Latin-script multigraph|Multigraphs]] |list3={{#invoke:navbox|navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = | liststyle = | listclass = hlist |group1 = [[List of Latin-script digraphs|Digraphs]] |list1 = *[[Ch (digraph)|Ch]] *[[Dz (digraph)|Dz]] *[[Dž]] *[[Gh (digraph)|Gh]] *[[IJ (digraph)|IJ]] *[[Lj (digraph)|Lj]] *[[Ll]] *[[Hungarian ly|Ly]] *[[Nh (digraph)|Nh]] *[[Nj (digraph)|Nj]] *[[Ny (digraph)|Ny]] *[[Sh (digraph)|Sh]] *[[Sz (digraph)|Sz]] *[[Th (digraph)|Th]] |group2 = [[List of Latin-script trigraphs|Trigraphs]] |list2 = * [[Hungarian dzs|dzs]] * [[Eau (trigraph)|eau]] |group3 = [[List of Latin-script tetragraphs|Tetragraphs]] |list3 = *[[Ough (orthography)|ough]] <!--|group4 = [[List of Latin-script pentagraphs|Pentagraphs]] |list4 = [[tzsch]]-->
}} |group4=Keyboard layouts ([[List of Latin-script keyboard layouts|list]]) |list4= * [[QWERTY]] * [[QWERTZ]] * [[AZERTY]] * [[Dvorak keyboard layout|Dvorak]] * [[Colemak]] * [[BÉPO]] * [[Neo (keyboard layout)|Neo]]
|group5=Historical standards |list5= * [[ISO/IEC 646]] * [[Western Latin character sets]]
|group6=Current standards |list6= * [[Latin script in Unicode|Unicode]] * [[DIN 91379|DIN 91379: Unicode subset for Europe]]
|group7=Lists |list7= * [[List of precomposed Latin characters in Unicode|Precomposed Latin characters in Unicode]] * [[Latin letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering|Letters used in mathematics, science, and engineering]] * [[List of typographical symbols and punctuation marks]]
|below = * [[Diacritic]]s * [[Palaeography]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|Template:Latin script/doc}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#invoke:navbox|navbox |name = Latin script/main |state = {{{state|<noinclude>uncollapsed</noinclude>}}}
| title = [[Latin script]] | bodyclass = hlist
|above= * [[History of the Latin script|History]] * [[Spread of the Latin script|Spread]] * [[Romanization]] * [[Roman numerals]] * [[Ligature_(writing)#Latin_alphabet|Ligatures]]
|group1=[[Latin-script alphabet|Alphabets]] ([[List of Latin-script alphabets|list]]) |list1= *[[Classical Latin alphabet]] *[[ISO basic Latin alphabet]] *Phonetic alphabets **[[International Phonetic Alphabet]] **[[X-SAMPA]] *[[Spelling alphabet]]
|group2=Letters ([[List of Latin-script letters|list]]) |list2 = {{(!}} style="margin: 0 -0.25em; width: 100%;" {{!}}- {{Latin script/row26col | title=Letters of the [[ISO basic Latin alphabet]]}} {{Latin script/row26col |A{{!}}Aa|B{{!}}Bb|C{{!}}Cc|D{{!}}Dd|E{{!}}Ee|F{{!}}Ff|G{{!}}Gg|H{{!}}Hh|I{{!}}Ii|J{{!}}Jj|K{{!}}Kk|L{{!}}Ll|M{{!}}Mm |N{{!}}Nn|O{{!}}Oo|P{{!}}Pp|Q{{!}}Qq|R{{!}}Rr|S{{!}}Ss|T{{!}}Tt|U{{!}}Uu|V{{!}}Vv|W{{!}}Ww|X{{!}}Xx|Y{{!}}Yy|Z{{!}}Zz }} {{Latin script/row26col | title=Additional Latin letters}} {{Latin script/row26col |Æ{{!}}Æ æ|Latin alpha{{!}}Ɑ ɑ|Turned v{{!}}Ʌ ʌ|Latin beta{{!}}Ꞵ ꞵ|eth{{!}}Ð ð|Latin epsilon{{!}}Ɛ ɛ|Ə{{!}}Ə ə|Ǝ{{!}}Ǝ ə|Latin gamma{{!}}Ɣ ɣ|Gha{{!}}Ƣ ƣ|Latin iota{{!}}Ɩ ɩ|Turned h{{!}}Ɥ ɥ|Lambda (Latin letter){{!}}Ꟛ ꟛ|Eng (letter){{!}}Ŋ ŋ |Œ{{!}}Œ œ|Open O{{!}}Ɔ ɔ|ɤ{{!}}Ɤ ɤ|Kra (letter){{!}}Kʼ ĸ|Ʀ{{!}}Ʀ ʀ|ß{{!}}ẞ ß|Esh (letter){{!}}Ʃ ʃ|Ɯ{{!}}Ɯ ɯ|Ʊ{{!}}Ʊ ʊ|Latin omega{{!}}Ꞷ ꞷ|Ʋ{{!}}Ʋ ʋ|Wynn{{!}}Ƿ ƿ }} {{Latin script/row26col |Yogh{{!}}Ȝ ȝ|Latin theta{{!}}ϴ θ|Ezh{{!}}Ʒ ʒ|Ƹ{{!}}Ƹ ƹ|Thorn (letter){{!}}Þ þ|Ou (ligature){{!}}Ȣ ȣ|Chi (letter){{!}}Ꭓ ꭓ|Glottal stop (letter){{!}}Ɂ ʔ ɂ|꟎{{!}}꟎ ʕ ꟏|ǀ|ǁ|ǂ|ǃ|ʘ|ʻOkina{{!}}ʻ|Modifier letter apostrophe{{!}}ʼ|Saltillo (linguistics){{!}}Ꞌ ꞌ|Tone two{{!}}Ƨ ƨ|Tresillo (letter){{!}}Ꜫ ꜫ|Cuatrillo{{!}}Ꜭ ꜭ|Tone five{{!}}Ƽ ƽ|Tone six{{!}}Ƅ ƅ|7 (letter){{!}}7|}} {{!}}- {{Latin script/letter with all diacritics| show letter={{{show letter|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic|no}}} }} {{!}}- {{#switch: {{{show diacritic|no}}} |dot = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic=dot below}} |#default = {{Latin script/diacritic with all letters| show diacritic={{{show diacritic 2|no}}} }} }} {{!}}- {{Latin script/AZ09 pairs| 1={{{1|}}} | show pairs={{{show pairs|no}}}| show letter={{{show letter|}}}}} {{!)}}
|group3=[[Latin-script multigraph|Multigraphs]] |list3={{#invoke:navbox|navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = | liststyle = | listclass = hlist |group1 = [[List of Latin-script digraphs|Digraphs]] |list1 = *[[Ch (digraph)|Ch]] *[[Dz (digraph)|Dz]] *[[Dž]] *[[Gh (digraph)|Gh]] *[[IJ (digraph)|IJ]] *[[Lj (digraph)|Lj]] *[[Ll]] *[[Hungarian ly|Ly]] *[[Nh (digraph)|Nh]] *[[Nj (digraph)|Nj]] *[[Ny (digraph)|Ny]] *[[Sh (digraph)|Sh]] *[[Sz (digraph)|Sz]] *[[Th (digraph)|Th]] |group2 = [[List of Latin-script trigraphs|Trigraphs]] |list2 = * [[Hungarian dzs|dzs]] * [[Eau (trigraph)|eau]] |group3 = [[List of Latin-script tetragraphs|Tetragraphs]] |list3 = *[[Ough (orthography)|ough]]
}} |group4=Keyboard layouts ([[List of Latin-script keyboard layouts|list]]) |list4= * [[QWERTY]] * [[QWERTZ]] * [[AZERTY]] * [[Dvorak keyboard layout|Dvorak]] * [[Colemak]] * [[BÉPO]] * [[Neo (keyboard layout)|Neo]]
